title: Terraria Item
description: This texture pack adds ingots, swords, armor and tools. All changes can be found on the Terraria wiki page and calamity-mod wiki. it also works on older versions 1.16.x-1.2x.x
body:
This texture pack introduces new designs for ingots, swords, armor, and tools. For a full list of changes, check the Terraria Wiki page.

To use these textures, you’ll need the Cit Resewn mod. Additionally, to avoid constantly referring to the wiki, I recommend installing the RP Renames mod, which provides in-game name references.

Compatibility: The pack works on older versions, including 1.16.x up to 1.20.5.
